effects.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your Deck.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then you can place up to 4 [Boney] Vivosaurs in your Discard Pile to the bottom of your Deck.

effects.name: Boney Swirl
effects.effect: Discard 1 [Boney] Vivosaur on your Field, then play 1 [Boney]  Vivosaur from your Discard Pile, except "B-Ptera".
